reasoning: Technical axis is strong: clean 1px hard outlines throughout, 2-3 tone hard shading on gold crown and stone base, no AA, pixel-grid-snapped geometry, hand-pixeled detail. Scores ~8 technically. Emotional axis is weaker: the dark teal body framing a glowing blue cross reads sacred/formal rather than bright-warm-charming Hyrule. Gold crown at top and red gem add warmth but are visually minor compared to the cool dominant body. Silhouette is a tall narrow obelisk — not round or toy-diorama-friendly. Palette hits saturated blues and golds (Zelda-adjacent) but composition mood leans shrine/temple rather than joyful adventure checkpoint. Not grim or scary, so not a hard fail on emotional axis, but charm is subdued. Emotional ~6. Weighted: 0.6*6 + 0.4*8 = 6.8, rounded to 7. Marginal — warmer body colors or a friendlier silhouette would push to pass.
